column1: # SCOPE: full 209-parish extraction from the AOD FY24/25 parish workbooks (aod.filecamp.com per data/aod-workbook-links.csv); mined 2026-07-20 via filecamp api/shares -> api/serve (FC-Share header); own-row parse of the Mass Count & Capacity page and the Assets/Liabilities page of each workbook.
# METHOD: savings_per_attendee = unrestricted ÷ attendance (October weekly); 200 of 209 report both; rank over those 200. Cross-check: Divine Providence #9 of 200

column2: balance-sheet for 204 of 209; unparsed rows carry empty cells — see issue #23.
